case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK TRUST COMPANY AMERICAS VS. JASMINE SHEIBA MANCINI et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MANCINI, JASMINE SHEIBA
